### Definition of done (check before final submission)
- [ ] Runs in the cluster — Pods healthy, no crash loops
- [ ] Reachable or observable (Service / Ingress / logs / UI)
- [ ] Repo explains how to deploy it
- [ ] I can demo it live and walk through it in Lens
